config.script:
function nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu(byval iMc) select case iMc case 1 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "stycznia" case 2 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "lutego" case 3 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "marca" case 4 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "kwietnia" case 5 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "maja" case 6 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "czerwca" case 7 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "lipca" case 8 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "sierpnia" case 9 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "września" case 10 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "października" case 11 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "listopada" case 12 nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu = "grudnia" end select end function
class CCalendarBuilder private m_nMode 'operation mode
private m_dFirstDay 'first visible day private m_dLastDay 'last visible day
private m_pTable 'destination container private m_pTB 'table builder helper
private m_dCurrentDate 'current date (for operations) private m_iCurrentHour 'current hour (for operations) private m_pCurrentCell 'current cell (for current date/hour) private m_pLastElement 'last element
private m_nRowMultiplier'row multiplying factor private m_nExtraCols
private sub class_initialize() set m_pTB = nothing set m_pTable = nothing set m_pCurrentCell = nothing set m_pLastElement = nothing m_nRowMultiplier = 1 m_nExtraCols = 0 end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pTB = nothing set m_pTable = nothing set m_pCurrentCell = nothing set m_pLastElement = nothing end sub
public sub init(byref pContainer,byval nMode,byval dMainDate) m_nMode = nMode set m_pTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) m_pTable.border = 1 set m_pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(m_pTable) roundup_dates dMainDate m_dCurrentDate = dMainDate m_iCurrentHour = -1 end sub
public sub build_frame() select case m_nMode case CALENDAR_MODE_DAY build_internal_day case CALENDAR_MODE_WEEK build_internal_week case CALENDAR_MODE_MONTH build_internal_month case CALENDAR_MODE_YEAR build_internal_year end select end sub
public property let extracols(byval nExtra) m_nExtraCols = nExtra end property
'------------------------------------------------------------------ ' currentday property '------------------------------------------------------------------ public property get firstday() firstday = m_dFirstDay end property '------------------------------------------------------------------ public property get lastday() lastday = m_dLastDay end property '------------------------------------------------------------------
public property get currentday() currentday = m_dCurrentDate end property
public property get currenthour() currenthour = m_iCurrentHour end property
public property let currentday(byval dDate) if dDate <> currentday then m_dCurrentDate = dDate recalc_coords #ifdef _DEBUG m_pCurrentCell.backcolor = rgb(255,0,0) #endif end if end property
public property let currenthour(byval iHour) if iHour <> m_iCurrentHour then m_iCurrentHour = iHour recalc_coords end if end property
public sub restart currentday = m_dFirstDay end sub public property get nextday() if currentday < m_dLastDay then currentday = currentday + 1 nextday = true else nextday = false end if end property
public property get cell() set cell = m_pCurrentCell end property
public property get element() set element = m_pLastElement end property
public function addtext(byval strTxt) set addtext = addtexthli(strTxt,nothing) end function public function addtexthli(byval strTxt,byref pHLI) dim pTxtCtrl if len(strTxt) >= 64 then set pTxtCtrl = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1) else set pTxtCtrl = cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) end if pTxtCtrl.value = strTxt set pTxtCtrl.hli = pHLI set m_pLastElement = pTxtCtrl set addtexthli = me end function
public property get extracell(byval nMonth,byval nExtraCol) if nMonth = -1 then set extracell = m_pTable.header.row(2).cell(nExtraCol + 31 + 1) else set extracell = m_pTable.body.row(nMonth).cell(nExtraCol + 31 + 1) end if end property '------------------------------------------------------------------ 'internal utilities '------------------------------------------------------------------ private sub roundup_dates(byval dMainDate) select case m_nMode case CALENDAR_MODE_DAY m_dFirstDay = dMainDate m_dLastDay = dMainDate case CALENDAR_MODE_WEEK m_dFirstDay = dMainDate - weekday(dMainDate,vbMonday) + 1 m_dLastDay = m_dFirstDay + 6 case CALENDAR_MODE_MONTH m_dFirstDay = dateserial(year(dMainDate),month(dMainDate),1) m_dFirstDay = m_dFirstDay - weekday(m_dFirstDay,vbMonday) + 1 m_dLastDay = dateserial(year(dMainDate),month(dMainDate)+1,0) m_dLastDay = m_dLastDay + (7 - weekday(m_dLastDay,vbMonday)) case CALENDAR_MODE_YEAR m_dFirstDay = dateserial(year(dMainDate),1,1) m_dLastDay = dateserial(year(dMainDate)+1,1,1)-1 end select
#ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 0,0,cstr(m_dFirstDay) + "...." + cstr(m_dLastDay) #endif end sub
private sub recalc_coords dim nRow,nCol select case m_nMode case CALENDAR_MODE_DAY set m_pCurrentCell = m_pTable.body.row(currenthour + 1).cell(2) exit sub case CALENDAR_MODE_WEEK nCol = 3 nRow = weekday(currentday,vbMonday) case CALENDAR_MODE_MONTH nCol = weekday(currentday,vbMonday) + 1 nRow = datediff("w",m_dFirstDay,currentday) * 2 + 2 case CALENDAR_MODE_YEAR nRow = month(currentday) nCol = day(currentday) + 1 end select set m_pCurrentCell = m_pTable.body.row(nRow).cell(nCol) end sub
private sub build_internal_day() '--- header m_pTB.section_head m_pTB.newrow with m_pTB.newcell.newcell.cell .align = ALIGN_CENTER dim strTxt : strTxt = cstr(datepart("d",currentday)) + _ " " + nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu(month(currentday)) + " " + cstr(year(currentday)) m_pTB.addtext strTxt end with '--- body m_pTB.section_body dim iter for iter = 0 to 23 m_pTB.newrow with m_pTB.newcell.cell .width = MINIMIZE_SIZE .align = ALIGN_RIGHT m_pTB.addtext cstr(iter) + ":00" end with m_pTB.newcell next end sub
private sub build_internal_week() dim dDate : dDate = m_dFirstDay '--- header m_pTB.section_head m_pTB.newrow with m_pTB.newcell.cell .colspan =3 .align = ALIGN_CENTER end with m_pTB.addtext "Tydzień " + right(" " + cstr(datepart("ww",dDate)),2) + _ " (" + nx_.display.fulldate(firstday) + " ... " + nx_.display.fulldate(lastday) + ")" '--- body m_pTB.section_body dim iter for iter = 1 to 7 m_pTB.newrow if iter < 6 then m_pTB.row.height=2000 else m_pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(224,224,224) end if '---------------- with m_pTB.newcell.cell .width = 1800 .keepline=true end with dim strTxt : strTxt = cstr(datepart("d",dDate)) + " " + nazwa_miesiaca_w_dopelniaczu(month(dDate)) m_pTB.addtext strTxt if iter > 5 then m_pTb.element.forecolor=rgb(255,0,0) end if '---------------- with m_pTB.newcell.cell .width = MINIMIZE_SIZE .keepline=true end with
m_pTB.addtext WeekdayName(iter,true,vbMonday) m_pTB.element.bold = true if iter > 5 then m_pTb.element.forecolor=rgb(255,0,0) end if '---------------- m_pTB.newcell dDate = dDate + 1 next end sub
private sub build_internal_month() '--- header m_pTB.section_head m_pTB.newrow m_pTB.newcell.addtext MonthName(month(m_dCurrentDate)) + " " + cstr(year(m_dCurrentDate)) with m_pTB.cell .colspan = 8 .align = ALIGN_CENTER end with m_pTB.newrow with m_pTB.newcell.cell .width = MINIMIZE_SIZE end with
dim iter for iter = 1 to 7 m_pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER m_pTB.addtext WeekdayName(iter,true,vbMonday) if iter > 5 then m_pTb.element.forecolor=rgb(255,0,0) end if m_pTb.element.bold = true next '--- body m_pTB.section_body dim dDate : dDate = m_dFirstDay do while dDate <= m_dLastDay m_pTB.newrow with m_pTB.newcell.cell ' .rowspan = 2 .align = ALIGN_RIGHT end with m_pTB.addtext right(" " + cstr(datepart("ww",dDate)),2) m_pTB.element.bold=true for iter = 1 to 7 with m_pTB.newcell.cell .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .width = 1400 if month(m_dCurrentDate) <> month(dDate + iter - 1) then .backcolor = rgb(224,224,224) end if end with m_pTB.addtext day(dDate + iter - 1) if iter > 5 then m_pTb.element.forecolor=rgb(255,0,0) end if next m_pTB.newrow.row.height=1000 m_pTB.newcell for iter = 1 to 7 m_pTB.newcell if month(m_dCurrentDate) <> month(dDate + iter - 1) then m_pTB.cell.backcolor = rgb(224,224,224) end if next dDate = dDate + 7 loop end sub
private sub build_internal_year() '--- header m_pTB.section_head m_pTB.newrow m_pTB.row.fontsize=1 m_pTB.newcell.addtext "rok " + cstr(year(m_dCurrentDate)) with m_pTB.cell .colspan = 32 + m_nExtraCols .align = ALIGN_CENTER end with m_pTB.newrow m_pTB.row.fontsize=1 m_pTB.newcell.addtext "Miesiąc" dim iter for iter = 1 to 31 + m_nExtraCols m_pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT m_pTB.addtext right(" " + cstr(iter),2) next '--- body m_pTB.section_body dim iterMc for iterMc = 1 to 12 m_pTB.newrow m_pTB.row.fontsize=1 m_pTB.newcell.addtext MonthName(iterMc) m_pTB.cell.width = MAXIMIZE_SIZE
for iter = 1 to 31 + m_nExtraCols m_pTB.newcell next next end sub
'--------------------------------- public function add_extra_row(byref intCol, byref strNapis) if intCol = 1 then m_pTB.newrow m_pTB.row.fontsize=1 m_pTB.newcell.addtext "" m_pTB.cell.colspan=30 m_pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT m_pTB.newcell.addtext strNapis m_pTB.cell.colspan=2 m_pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
else m_pTB.newcell.addtext strNapis m_pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_LEFT end if
end function 'iteracja ***************************** public function init_iterator currentday = m_dDataOd - 1 set init_iterator = me end function
public function next_day currentday = currentday + 1 if currentday > m_dDataDo then next_day = false else next_day = true end if end function
end class
'--- utworz calendar builder dla daty dMainDate, w trybie wyswietlania nMode '--- pracujący w kontenerze pContainer function get_calendar_builder(byref pContainer,byval nMode,byval dMainDate) dim pCB : set pCB = new CCalendarBuilder pCB.init pContainer,nMode,dMainDate set get_calendar_builder = pCB end function
